columns.extraction_plan: The 'Median Follow-Up Duration (mo)' is not reported in the PDF. The document mentions 'median treatment duration' in the 'Patient Characteristics' section (Chunk 9, page 4) and the 'Discussion' section (Chunk 10, page 11), stating, for example, 'median treatment duration in ARASENS was 41 months for darolutamide plus ADT and docetaxel versus 34.1 months in the docetaxel subgroup of the abiraterone group in PEACE-1'. However, this refers to the duration patients received treatment, not the total follow-up duration for the study. I also reviewed the abstract (Chunk 8, page 1), the 'Methods' section (Chunk 8, page 2), Table 1 (Chunk 1, page 5), Table 2 (Chunk 4, page 8), Table 3 (Chunk 5, page 9), Table 4 (Chunk 6, page 10), Figure 2 (Chunk 2, page 6), Figure 3 (Chunk 3, page 7), and Figure A1 (Chunk 7, page 16), and did not find the median follow-up duration.
